name: iot-dc3
desc: IoT DC3 is a fully open-source distributed Internet of Things (IoT) platform built on Spring Cloud. It accelerates IoT project development and simplifies IoT d…
descFull: IoT DC3 is a fully open-source distributed Internet of Things (IoT) platform built on Spring Cloud. It accelerates IoT project development and simplifies IoT device management, providing comprehensive solutions for building robust IoT systems.
